description: Microsoft pushed its OpenXML format through ISO to compete with the ODF open-source format. The event tracks the global pushback from open-source advocates against Microsoft's attempt to 'standardize' proprietary formats.

key_events.description: Microsoft announces plan to make Office XML an ISO standard.
Open source community launches 'No-XML' protests across European bodies.
ISO votes in favor of OpenXML adoption despite heavy complaints.
Final standard ratification seen by many as a victory of corporate power over open processes.

calibration_notes: Useful for understanding bureaucratic capture and how proprietary firms utilize standards bodies to cement influence.
